templates.name: Mutual NDA
templates.description: Standard mutual non-disclosure agreement for two parties to share confidential information. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to capture the business-specific terms (parties, effective date, etc.) that are incorporated by reference into the standard terms.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products. Covers subscription terms, order forms, and standard legal protections for both vendors and customers.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Standard agreement for early-stage design partnerships where a vendor works closely with a customer to co-develop or refine a product prior to general availability.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Standard service level agreement intended to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA). Defines uptime commitments, remedies, and measurement methodologies.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Standard agreement for professional and consulting services engagements, covering statements of work, deliverables, payment terms, and intellectual property ownership.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Standard data processing agreement establishing the terms under which a service provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, covering GDPR and other privacy law requirements.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Standard agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software, covering license grants, restrictions, support, and standard legal protections for both licensors and licensees.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Standard agreement for business partnerships, covering revenue sharing, referral arrangements, co-selling, and the rights and obligations of each partner.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Standard short-term trial or evaluation agreement allowing a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a longer-term commercial deal.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Standard HIPAA-compliant business associate agreement establishing the terms under which a service provider handles protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Standard addendum addressing AI-specific terms such as data use for model training, AI-generated output ownership, acceptable use policies, and related disclosures, designed to be attached to a primary software agreement.
